1.text: The burden<S>4853</S> of the word<S>1697</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S> to Israel<S>3478</S> by<S>3027</S> Malachi<S>4401</S>. <sup>by: Heb. by the hand of</sup>

I have loved<S>157</S> you, saith<S>5002</S> the LORD<S>3068</S>. Yet ye say<S>559</S>, Wherein hast thou loved<S>157</S> us? Was not Esau<S>6215</S> Jacob's<S>3290</S> brother<S>251</S>? saith<S>559</S> the LORD<S>3068</S>: yet I loved<S>157</S> Jacob<S>3290</S>,
And I hated<S>8130</S> Esau<S>6215</S>, and laid<S>7760</S> his mountains<S>2022</S> and his heritage<S>5159</S> waste<S>8077</S> for the dragons<S>8568</S> of the wilderness<S>4057</S>.

Whereas Edom<S>123</S> saith<S>559</S>, We are impoverished<S>7567</S>, but we will return<S>7725</S> and build<S>1129</S> the desolate places<S>2723</S>; thus saith<S>559</S> the LORD<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>, They shall build<S>1129</S>, but I will throw down<S>2040</S>; and they shall call<S>7121</S> them, The border<S>1366</S> of wickedness<S>7564</S>, and, The people<S>5971</S> against whom the LORD<S>3068</S> hath indignation<S>2194</S> for<S>5704</S> ever<S>5769</S>.

And your eyes<S>5869</S> shall see<S>7200</S>, and ye shall say<S>559</S>, The LORD<S>3068</S> will be magnified<S>1431</S> from the border<S>1366</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>. <sup>from: or, upon: Heb. from upon</sup>

A son<S>1121</S> honoureth<S>3513</S> his father<S>1</S>, and a servant<S>5650</S> his master<S>113</S>: if then I be a father<S>1</S>, where is mine honour<S>3519</S>? and if I be a master<S>113</S>, where is my fear<S>4172</S>? saith<S>559</S> the LORD<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S> unto you, O priests<S>3548</S>, that despise<S>959</S> my name<S>8034</S>. And ye say<S>559</S>, Wherein have we despised<S>959</S> thy name<S>8034</S>?

Ye offer<S>5066</S> polluted<S>1351</S> bread<S>3899</S> upon mine altar<S>4196</S>; and ye say<S>559</S>, Wherein have we polluted<S>1351</S> thee? In that ye say<S>559</S>, The table<S>7979</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S> is contemptible<S>959</S>. <sup>offer: or, bring unto, etc</sup>

And if ye offer<S>5066</S> the blind<S>5787</S> for sacrifice<S>2076</S>, is it not evil<S>7451</S>? and if ye offer<S>5066</S> the lame<S>6455</S> and sick<S>2470</S>, is it not evil<S>7451</S>? offer<S>7126</S> it now unto thy governor<S>6346</S>; will he be pleased<S>7521</S> with thee, or accept<S>5375</S> thy person<S>6440</S>? saith<S>559</S> the LORD<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>. <sup>for: Heb. to</sup>

And now, I pray you, beseech<S>2470</S> <S>6440</S> God<S>410</S> that he will be gracious<S>2603</S> unto us: this hath been by your means<S>3027</S>: will he regard<S>5375</S> your persons<S>6440</S>? saith<S>559</S> the LORD<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>. <sup>God: Heb. the face of God</sup> <sup>by: Heb. from your hand</sup>

Who is there even among you that would shut<S>5462</S> the doors<S>1817</S> for nought? neither do ye kindle<S>215</S> fire on mine altar<S>4196</S> for nought<S>2600</S>. I have no pleasure<S>2656</S> in you, saith<S>559</S> the LORD<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>, neither will I accept<S>7521</S> an offering<S>4503</S> at your hand<S>3027</S>.

For from the rising<S>4217</S> of the sun<S>8121</S> even unto the going down<S>3996</S> of the same my name<S>8034</S> shall be great<S>1419</S> among the Gentiles<S>1471</S>; and in every place<S>4725</S> incense<S>6999</S> shall be offered<S>5066</S> unto my name<S>8034</S>, and a pure<S>2889</S> offering<S>4503</S>: for my name<S>8034</S> shall be great<S>1419</S> among the heathen<S>1471</S>, saith<S>559</S> the LORD<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>.

But ye have profaned<S>2490</S> it, in that ye say<S>559</S>, The table<S>7979</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S> is polluted<S>1351</S>; and the fruit<S>5108</S> thereof, even his meat<S>400</S>, is contemptible<S>959</S>.

Ye said<S>559</S> also, Behold, what a weariness<S>4972</S> is it! and ye have snuffed<S>5301</S> at it, saith<S>559</S> the LORD<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>; and ye brought<S>935</S> that which was torn<S>1497</S>, and the lame<S>6455</S>, and the sick<S>2470</S>; thus ye brought<S>935</S> an offering<S>4503</S>: should I accept<S>7521</S> this of your hand<S>3027</S>? saith<S>559</S> the LORD<S>3068</S>. <sup>and ye have: or, whereas ye might have blown it away</sup>

But cursed<S>779</S> be the deceiver<S>5230</S>, which<S>3426</S> hath in his flock<S>5739</S> a male<S>2145</S>, and voweth<S>5087</S>, and sacrificeth<S>2076</S> unto the Lord<S>136</S> a corrupt thing<S>7843</S>: for I am a great<S>1419</S> King<S>4428</S>, saith<S>559</S> the LORD<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>, and my name<S>8034</S> is dreadful<S>3372</S> among the heathen<S>1471</S>. <sup>which: Heb. in whose flock is</sup>

2.text: And now, O ye priests<S>3548</S>, this commandment<S>4687</S> is for you.

If ye will not hear<S>8085</S>, and if ye will not lay<S>7760</S> it to heart<S>3820</S>, to give<S>5414</S> glory<S>3519</S> unto my name<S>8034</S>, saith<S>559</S> the LORD<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>, I will even send<S>7971</S> a curse<S>3994</S> upon you, and I will curse<S>779</S> your blessings<S>1293</S>: yea, I have cursed<S>779</S> them already, because ye do not lay<S>7760</S> it to heart<S>3820</S>.

Behold, I will corrupt<S>1605</S> your seed<S>2233</S>, and spread<S>2219</S> dung<S>6569</S> upon your faces<S>6440</S>, even the dung<S>6569</S> of your solemn feasts<S>2282</S>; and one shall take you away<S>5375</S> with it. <sup>corrupt: or, reprove</sup> <sup>spread: Heb. scatter</sup> <sup>one: or, it shall take you away to it</sup>

And ye shall know<S>3045</S> that I have sent<S>7971</S> this commandment<S>4687</S> unto you, that my covenant<S>1285</S> might be with Levi<S>3878</S>, saith<S>559</S> the LORD<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>.

My covenant<S>1285</S> was with him of life<S>2416</S> and peace<S>7965</S>; and I gave<S>5414</S> them to him for the fear<S>4172</S> wherewith he feared<S>3372</S> me, and was afraid<S>2865</S> before<S>6440</S> my name<S>8034</S>.

The law<S>8451</S> of truth<S>571</S> was in his mouth<S>6310</S>, and iniquity<S>5766</S> was not found<S>4672</S> in his lips<S>8193</S>: he walked<S>1980</S> with me in peace<S>7965</S> and equity<S>4334</S>, and did turn<S>7725</S> many<S>7227</S> away<S>7725</S> from iniquity<S>5771</S>.

For the priest's<S>3548</S> lips<S>8193</S> should keep<S>8104</S> knowledge<S>1847</S>, and they should seek<S>1245</S> the law<S>8451</S> at his mouth<S>6310</S>: for he is the messenger<S>4397</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>.

But ye are departed<S>5493</S> out of the way<S>1870</S>; ye have caused many<S>7227</S> to stumble<S>3782</S> at the law<S>8451</S>; ye have corrupted<S>7843</S> the covenant<S>1285</S> of Levi<S>3878</S>, saith<S>559</S> the LORD<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>. <sup>stumble at: or, fall in</sup>

Therefore have I also made<S>5414</S> you contemptible<S>959</S> and base<S>8217</S> before all the people<S>5971</S>, according<S>6310</S> as ye have not kept<S>8104</S> my ways<S>1870</S>, but have been partial<S>5375</S> <S>6440</S> in the law<S>8451</S>. <sup>have been: or, lifted up the face against: Heb. accepted faces</sup>

Have we not all one<S>259</S> father<S>1</S>? hath not one<S>259</S> God<S>410</S> created<S>1254</S> us? why do we deal treacherously<S>898</S> every man<S>376</S> against his brother<S>251</S>, by profaning<S>2490</S> the covenant<S>1285</S> of our fathers<S>1</S>?

Judah<S>3063</S> hath dealt treacherously<S>898</S>, and an abomination<S>8441</S> is committed<S>6213</S> in Israel<S>3478</S> and in Jerusalem<S>3389</S>; for Judah<S>3063</S> hath profaned<S>2490</S> the holiness<S>6944</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S> which he loved<S>157</S>, and hath married<S>1166</S> the daughter<S>1323</S> of a strange<S>5236</S> god<S>410</S>. <sup>loved: or, ought to love</sup>

The LORD<S>3068</S> will cut off<S>3772</S> the man<S>376</S> that doeth<S>6213</S> this, the master<S>5782</S> and the scholar<S>6030</S>, out of the tabernacles<S>168</S> of Jacob<S>3290</S>, and him that offereth<S>5066</S> an offering<S>4503</S> unto the LORD<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>. <sup>the master: or, him that waketh, and him that answereth</sup>

And this have ye done<S>6213</S> again<S>8145</S>, covering<S>3680</S> the altar<S>4196</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S> with tears<S>1832</S>, with weeping<S>1065</S>, and with crying out<S>603</S>, insomuch that he regardeth<S>6437</S> not the offering<S>4503</S> any more, or receiveth<S>3947</S> it with good will<S>7522</S> at your hand<S>3027</S>.

Yet ye say<S>559</S>, Wherefore<S>4100</S>? Because the LORD<S>3068</S> hath been witness<S>5749</S> between thee and the wife<S>802</S> of thy youth<S>5271</S>, against whom thou hast dealt treacherously<S>898</S>: yet is she thy companion<S>2278</S>, and the wife<S>802</S> of thy covenant<S>1285</S>.

And did not he make<S>6213</S> one<S>259</S>? Yet had he the residue<S>7605</S> of the spirit<S>7307</S>. And wherefore one<S>259</S>? That he might seek<S>1245</S> a godly<S>430</S> seed<S>2233</S>. Therefore take heed<S>8104</S> to your spirit<S>7307</S>, and let none deal treacherously<S>898</S> against the wife<S>802</S> of his youth<S>5271</S>. <sup>residue: or, excellency</sup> <sup>godly: Heb. seed of God</sup> <sup>treacherously: or, unfaithfully</sup>

For the LORD<S>3068</S>, the God<S>430</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>, saith<S>559</S> that he hateth<S>8130</S> putting away<S>7971</S>: for one covereth<S>3680</S> violence<S>2555</S> with his garment<S>3830</S>, saith<S>559</S> the LORD<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>: therefore take heed<S>8104</S> to your spirit<S>7307</S>, that ye deal not treacherously<S>898</S>. <sup>that he: or, if he hate her, put her away</sup> <sup>putting: Heb. to put away</sup>

Ye have wearied<S>3021</S> the LORD<S>3068</S> with your words<S>1697</S>. Yet ye say<S>559</S>, Wherein have we wearied<S>3021</S> him? When ye say<S>559</S>, Every one that doeth<S>6213</S> evil<S>7451</S> is good<S>2896</S> in the sight<S>5869</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S>, and he delighteth<S>2654</S> in them; or, Where is the God<S>430</S> of judgment<S>4941</S>?

3.text: Behold, I will send<S>7971</S> my messenger<S>4397</S>, and he shall prepare<S>6437</S> the way<S>1870</S> before<S>6440</S> me: and the Lord<S>113</S>, whom ye seek<S>1245</S>, shall suddenly<S>6597</S> come<S>935</S> to his temple<S>1964</S>, even the messenger<S>4397</S> of the covenant<S>1285</S>, whom ye delight<S>2655</S> in: behold, he shall come<S>935</S>, saith<S>559</S> the LORD<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>.

But who may abide<S>3557</S> the day<S>3117</S> of his coming<S>935</S>? and who shall stand<S>5975</S> when he appeareth<S>7200</S>? for he is like a refiner's<S>6884</S> fire<S>784</S>, and like fullers'<S>3526</S> soap<S>1287</S>:

And he shall sit<S>3427</S> as a refiner<S>6884</S> and purifier<S>2891</S> of silver<S>3701</S>: and he shall purify<S>2891</S> the sons<S>1121</S> of Levi<S>3878</S>, and purge<S>2212</S> them as gold<S>2091</S> and silver<S>3701</S>, that they may offer<S>5066</S> unto the LORD<S>3068</S> an offering<S>4503</S> in righteousness<S>6666</S>.

Then shall the offering<S>4503</S> of Judah<S>3063</S> and Jerusalem<S>3389</S> be pleasant<S>6149</S> unto the LORD<S>3068</S>, as in the days<S>3117</S> of old<S>5769</S>, and as in former<S>6931</S> years<S>8141</S>. <sup>former: or, ancient</sup>

And I will come near<S>7126</S> to you to judgment<S>4941</S>; and I will be a swift<S>4116</S> witness<S>5707</S> against the sorcerers<S>3784</S>, and against the adulterers<S>5003</S>, and against false<S>8267</S> swearers<S>7650</S>, and against those that oppress<S>6231</S> the hireling<S>7916</S> in his wages<S>7939</S>, the widow<S>490</S>, and the fatherless<S>3490</S>, and that turn aside<S>5186</S> the stranger<S>1616</S> from his right, and fear<S>3372</S> not me, saith<S>559</S> the LORD<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>. <sup>oppress: or, defraud</sup>
For I am the LORD<S>3068</S>, I change<S>8138</S> not; therefore ye sons<S>1121</S> of Jacob<S>3290</S> are not consumed<S>3615</S>.

Even from the days<S>3117</S> of your fathers<S>1</S> ye are gone away<S>5493</S> from mine ordinances<S>2706</S>, and have not kept<S>8104</S> them. Return<S>7725</S> unto me, and I will return<S>7725</S> unto you, saith<S>559</S> the LORD<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>. But ye said<S>559</S>, Wherein shall we return<S>7725</S>?
Will a man<S>120</S> rob<S>6906</S> God<S>430</S>? Yet ye have robbed<S>6906</S> me. But ye say<S>559</S>, Wherein have we robbed<S>6906</S> thee? In tithes<S>4643</S> and offerings<S>8641</S>.
Ye are cursed<S>779</S> with a curse<S>3994</S>: for ye have robbed<S>6906</S> me, even this whole nation<S>1471</S>.

Bring<S>935</S> ye all the tithes<S>4643</S> into the storehouse<S>214</S>, that there may be meat<S>2964</S> in mine house<S>1004</S>, and prove<S>974</S> me now herewith<S>2063</S>, saith<S>559</S> the LORD<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>, if I will not open<S>6605</S> you the windows<S>699</S> of heaven<S>8064</S>, and pour you out<S>7324</S> a blessing<S>1293</S>, that there shall not be room enough<S>1767</S> to receive it. <sup>pour: Heb. empty out</sup>

And I will rebuke<S>1605</S> the devourer<S>398</S> for your sakes, and he shall not destroy<S>7843</S> the fruits<S>6529</S> of your ground<S>127</S>; neither shall your vine<S>1612</S> cast her fruit<S>7921</S> before the time in the field<S>7704</S>, saith<S>559</S> the LORD<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>. <sup>destroy: Heb. corrupt</sup>
And all nations<S>1471</S> shall call you blessed<S>833</S>: for ye shall be a delightsome<S>2656</S> land<S>776</S>, saith<S>559</S> the LORD<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>.
Your words<S>1697</S> have been stout<S>2388</S> against me, saith<S>559</S> the LORD<S>3068</S>. Yet ye say<S>559</S>, What have we spoken<S>1696</S> so much against thee?

Ye have said<S>559</S>, It is vain<S>7723</S> to serve<S>5647</S> God<S>430</S>: and what profit<S>1215</S> is it that we have kept<S>8104</S> his ordinance<S>4931</S>, and that we have walked<S>1980</S> mournfully<S>6941</S> before<S>6440</S> the LORD<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>? <sup>ordinance: Heb. observation</sup> <sup>mournfully: Heb. in black</sup>

And now we call<S>833</S> the proud<S>2086</S> happy<S>833</S>; yea, they that work<S>6213</S> wickedness<S>7564</S> are set up<S>1129</S>; yea, they that tempt<S>974</S> God<S>430</S> are even delivered<S>4422</S>. <sup>are set up: Heb. are built</sup>

Then they that feared<S>3373</S> the LORD<S>3068</S> spake often<S>1696</S> one<S>376</S> to another<S>7453</S>: and the LORD<S>3068</S> hearkened<S>7181</S>, and heard<S>8085</S> it, and a book<S>5612</S> of remembrance<S>2146</S> was written<S>3789</S> before<S>6440</S> him for them that feared<S>3373</S> the LORD<S>3068</S>, and that thought<S>2803</S> upon his name<S>8034</S>.

And they shall be mine, saith<S>559</S> the LORD<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>, in that day<S>3117</S> when I make up<S>6213</S> my jewels<S>5459</S>; and I will spare<S>2550</S> them, as a man<S>376</S> spareth<S>2550</S> his own son<S>1121</S> that serveth<S>5647</S> him. <sup>jewels: or, special treasure</sup>

Then shall ye return<S>7725</S>, and discern<S>7200</S> between the righteous<S>6662</S> and the wicked<S>7563</S>, between him that serveth<S>5647</S> God<S>430</S> and him that serveth<S>5647</S> him not.

4.text: For, behold, the day<S>3117</S> cometh<S>935</S>, that shall burn<S>1197</S> as an oven<S>8574</S>; and all the proud<S>2086</S>, yea, and all that do<S>6213</S> wickedly<S>7564</S>, shall be stubble<S>7179</S>: and the day<S>3117</S> that cometh<S>935</S> shall burn them up<S>3857</S>, saith<S>559</S> the LORD<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>, that it shall leave<S>5800</S> them neither root<S>8328</S> nor branch<S>6057</S>.

But unto you that fear<S>3373</S> my name<S>8034</S> shall the Sun<S>8121</S> of righteousness<S>6666</S> arise<S>2224</S> with healing<S>4832</S> in his wings<S>3671</S>; and ye shall go forth<S>3318</S>, and grow up<S>6335</S> as calves<S>5695</S> of the stall<S>4770</S>.

And ye shall tread down<S>6072</S> the wicked<S>7563</S>; for they shall be ashes<S>665</S> under the soles<S>3709</S> of your feet<S>7272</S> in the day<S>3117</S> that I shall do<S>6213</S> this, saith<S>559</S> the LORD<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>.

Remember<S>2142</S> ye the law<S>8451</S> of Moses<S>4872</S> my servant<S>5650</S>, which I commanded<S>6680</S> unto him in Horeb<S>2722</S> for all Israel<S>3478</S>, with the statutes<S>2706</S> and judgments<S>4941</S>.

Behold, I will send<S>7971</S> you Elijah<S>452</S> the prophet<S>5030</S> before<S>6440</S> the coming<S>935</S> of the great<S>1419</S> and dreadful<S>3372</S> day<S>3117</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S>:

And he shall turn<S>7725</S> the heart<S>3820</S> of the fathers<S>1</S> to the children<S>1121</S>, and the heart<S>3820</S> of the children<S>1121</S> to their fathers<S>1</S>, lest I come<S>935</S> and smite<S>5221</S> the earth<S>776</S> with a curse<S>2764</S>.
